focus_points.label: How she's landing with the team this week.
focus_points.reason: Priya shipped a major feature on Monday, and the team noticed, but she’s been quieter this week. One possibility is normal post-launch recovery, but it’s worth clarifying whether anything feels unresolved or whether her visibility is just temporarily different.

focus_points.label: What she expects to own next quarter.
focus_points.reason: You want a clearer read on what Priya expects to own next quarter before you introduce the billing rewrite. Whether she’s already forming plans that the rewrite will disrupt is exactly the kind of misalignment that bi-weekly check-ins should catch early.

focus_points.label: Mentoring plans and how they’re progressing.
focus_points.reason: Priya mentioned wanting to mentor a few months ago and that thread never moved. Could be a timing/priority shift, or a dependency that hasn’t been unblocked yet—worth clarifying what she wants mentoring to look like and what’s stalled it.

focus_points.label: What support would unblock her next ownership.
focus_points.reason: Whether Priya needs air cover, clearer decision rights, or specific coaching to take on the next quarter’s work, this is the most actionable use of a bi-weekly 1:1 for a Senior IC—getting her unblocked so her ownership is predictable.
